title: Surgeon Vacancy at Columbia Asia - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Columbia Asia - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Columbia Asia has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Columbia Asia:
Columbia Asia is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia!
